LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING - ATTY. NOEL D. HIBBARD'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR THE PLAINTIFFS NHUNG HA AND DAVID SANCHEZ - MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL WAS WITHDRAWN AS TO MR. NHUNG NGOC HA. MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF DAVID SANCHEZ IS GRANTED ON THE CONDITION EITHER TO FILE A RESPONSE REGARDING DISCOVERY OR OBTAIN A SUFFICIENT CONTINUANCE ON DISCOVERY DEADLINES AS WELL AS THE ARBITRATION DEADLINES.
